name: 007 Story Mode Demo Mission
goalText: Test free story movement and zone-triggered dialogue without starting combat.

maps.name: 007 Story Mode Demo
maps.objectiveSummary: Walk Skye to the exit marker

briefing.title: Story Mode Demo
briefing.text: Free-walk test map. Move with WASD/arrows. Walk through the marked midpoint to trigger dialogue, then reach the exit marker. Combat should never start.
objectives: Walk to the midpoint dialogue trigger, then reach the exit.

objectives.label: Walk Skye to the exit marker
objectives.briefingText: Walk Skye to the exit marker

lines.name: Story Mode Demo
lines.text: Story map loaded. No rounds, no initiative, no Start Combat prompt. Move Skye freely with WASD or arrows.

lines.name: Eve
lines.text: That is the trigger. Same mission dialogue system, no combat wrapper required.

lines.name: Skye
lines.text: Good. Now let me walk without a committee.

lines.name: Story Mode Demo
lines.text: Victory. Reach-zone objectives work from Story Mode movement.

lines.name: Story Mode Demo
lines.text: Defeat path is available, but this demo should not use it.

victory.title: Story Demo Complete
victory.text: Story movement, zone dialogue, and reach-zone victory resolved without combat.
